overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a waterfront promenade during golden hour. The player passes an NCPD checkpoint and navigates through a dense homeless encampment with tents and makeshift shelters before emerging to an open view of the ocean and ferris wheel.

events.description: passing the NCPD checkpoint barriers and biohazard truck

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the promenade toward the checkpoint, passing the parked police truck

notable_agents.action: NCPD truck parked at checkpoint with biohazard symbol
person jogging past the camera toward the waterfront

entered.detail: black police truck with yellow NCPD logo and biohazard symbol
metal barricades with warning lights blocking the path
large amusement park wheel silhouetted against the sunset
tall futuristic buildings with glass facades and construction cranes
tall palm trees lining the promenade walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit waterfront promenade with the camera walking toward an NCPD checkpoint. A black police truck with biohazard markings sits on the left while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. The camera passes through checkpoint barriers as a jogger runs past on the right, with the ferris wheel visible in the golden hour haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense homeless encampment with tents and temporary shelters

events.description: turning right into the tent city area from the open promenade
navigating between closely packed tents and makeshift structures

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow paths between tents, turning to explore the encampment layout

entered.detail: colorful dome tents and temporary shelters set up on the pavement
small food trailer with yellow canopy and neon signage
trash bags, cardboard, and discarded items around the encampment
wide staircase leading up to a modern building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a dense homeless encampment filled with colorful tents, tarps, and scattered debris. Moving through narrow paths between shelters, the scene is partially shaded by overhead tarps and umbrellas. A yellow food cart stands on the right while the camera navigates around tables, chairs, and garbage bags, with the modern building wall forming a backdrop to the makeshift settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with ocean and amusement park views

events.description: emerging from the tent city to the open waterfront with clear ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking toward the waterfront with the sun setting over the ocean ahead

entered.detail: calm sea visible beyond the promenade edge reflecting the sunset
roller coaster tracks and carnival rides silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: Leaving the encampment behind, the camera emerges onto an open waterfront promenade with unobstructed views of the ocean and amusement park. The sun sits low on the horizon, casting long shadows through the palm trees. The ferris wheel and roller coaster structures stand silhouetted against the golden sky while modern skyscrapers loom on the right, creating a stark contrast between the luxury high-rises and the tent city now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile police checkpoint through a cluttered makeshift settlement and out toward a wide, sun-drenched coastline. It begins on a sunlit waterfront promenade, passing a black biohazard police truck and checkpoint barriers while futuristic skyscrapers and a distant ferris wheel loom in the golden haze. As the camera turns away from the main path, the open space narrows into a dense homeless encampment filled with colorful tents, scattered debris, and overhead tarps that cast deep shadows over narrow walkways and a yellow food cart. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the shelters back onto the open promenade, where the view opens up to the ocean and palm trees under a low-hanging sun. Finally, the camera reveals the silhouetted structures of an amusement park and a towering ferris wheel, creating a stark visual contrast between the luxury high-rises on the right and the poverty of the encampment left behind.
